goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'star of the hotel'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'stevenage'.
The train should leave on 'friday' and should 'arrive by 10:15'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '6 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse
Make sure you get area and star of the hotel
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to stevenage
The train should leave on friday and should arrive by 10:15
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 6 people
Make sure you get the reference number
